soa_observed_for_brasilvida_app_br.meaning: internal DNS currently forwards/recurses to public authoritative DNS for brasilvida.app.br

access_check.winrm_192_168_25_112: reachable but IP authentication blocked without TrustedHosts/explicit credentials
access_check.result: no administrative path available in this session

safe_change_plan_windows_dns.why_narrow_zone: avoids shadowing the entire public brasilvida.app.br zone and changes only the requested hostname

rollback_plan_windows_dns: Confirm Resolve-DnsName controle.brasilvida.app.br -Server 192.168.25.112 returns 201.16.254.25 or public recursive answer again
post_change_validation: ipconfig /flushdns on a LAN client or wait TTL/cache expiration
Resolve-DnsName controle.brasilvida.app.br -Type A from LAN client must return 192.168.25.33
GET http://controle.brasilvida.app.br/ must return Server: Caddy and title Treinamentos Brasil Vida
No response body should contain fw - Login or csrf-magic.js from gateway UI
blocker: missing administrative access to internal DNS server 192.168.25.112
